title: Non Drip Gloss Paint White 300ml | High Shine Finish for Wood & Metal | Drip-Free, Hardwearing, Long Lasting Interior & Exterior Gloss Paint
features: ✅ Smooth High Gloss Finish Delivers a mirror-like white finish that enhances wood and metal surfaces with a professional, polished look.
✅ Non-Drip Formula Specially designed thick consistency prevents drips and runs, making it ideal for use on vertical surfaces.
✅ Hardwearing & Long Lasting Creates a durable, scuff-resistant surface that protects against everyday wear and tear.
✅ Low Odour & Easy Application Applies smoothly with minimal smell — perfect for indoor use and quick DIY touch-ups.
✅ Interior & Exterior Use Ideal for doors, skirting boards, window frames, furniture, and metal fixtures, both inside and outside the home.
description: Achieve a flawless, professional finish with this Non Drip Gloss Paint White 300ml, designed for wood and metal surfaces. Its drip-free formula makes application easier and cleaner — perfect for vertical surfaces like doors, window frames, and furniture. With a high-gloss, long-lasting white finish, it provides strong protection against scuffs and scratches. Suitable for interior and exterior use, this paint offers smooth coverage, durability, and a bright, clean look that lasts. Ideal for both DIY users and professionals, this quick and easy-to-apply gloss is a must-have for any home improvement project.
